## Summary

Add **i18n (ES/EN)** to the dapp with next-intl — unify copy that is currently mixed Spanish/English across dashboard, auth, and error messages.

---

## Background

Issues and docs reference Spanish UX as follow-up. The landing is English-first; dapp shows mixed strings (`Sin tier`, English alerts, Spanish date formats in `format-score.ts`).

---

## Proposed implementation

**Library:** `next-intl` (App Router compatible)

**Structure:**
```
Front/messages/
  en.json
  es.json
Front/i18n.ts
Front/middleware.ts  # locale detection
```

**Scope (v1 pages):**
- `/login`, `/register`
- `/dashboard/*`
- `wallet-auth-card.tsx` error messages

**Locale switcher:** Footer toggle in `dapp-shell.tsx`

**Default:** `en` with `es` available

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] All user-facing strings on scoped pages use translation keys
- [ ] Locale persisted in cookie or localStorage
- [ ] No hardcoded Spanish/English mix in scoped components
- [ ] `npm run build` passes with both locales
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING documents how to add new keys

---

## Related

- #10 dapp design alignment
- #11 auth error copy improvement

---

## Out of scope

- API error message localization
- RTL languages
